TerraGS.bugfix: Devotion meter should now appear round start

snowyseshi.rscadd: Gave staff of testimonium master rod powers

snowyseshi.code_imp: Use correct span for master rod job check

Ordosian.bugfix: Fixed blood not using the right colors.

Ordosian.image: Changed all wounds and blood to whitescale.

CheffieGithub.rscadd: Added special intents to various weapons. They are started with Strong intent right clicks in combat mode and have differing effects.

CheffieGithub.bugfix: Fixed wurm jarosite dwarves being able to ready merc without any classes.

CheffieGithub.rscadd: Added TGchat, report issues with styling like it having bad contrast or anything.

realforest2001.bugfix: The game no longer trolls you by saying it paid your carriage toll.

realforest2001.rscadd: Archivist Chronicler now has Expert spellbook instead of Apprentice.

Snack-Max.rscadd: give housecarls satchels rather then wooden shields.

dwasint.rscadd: human npcs are more dynamic in their interaction
threat system to areas to scale ambush intensity, decreases as ambushes are spawned so FG can work

realforest2001.bugfix: The readied Monarch can no longer be made an automaton.
Fixed Hand, Consort and Heir being able to use the train.
Fixed flight never ending if wings are removed.
Vampires Antag event won't roll below lowpop threshold.

KevinfromHP.balance: Tweaked maneater resisting to factor in wrestling and strength.

KevinfromHP.bugfix: Fixes an issue where the Daewalker was spawning outside his prerequisites

realforest2001.bugfix: Fixed granted titles breaking if your name isn't correct.
Fixed rousman siege spawning invisible rousmen.
Fixed recognising folkheroes when their faces are hidden.
Fixed the really annoying warning left by an unused variable.

Mercenary cloth in belt -> Proper Bandage
